creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 204272
upnp18 - new port

I made a small correction in a patch file.

This port still needs to be added to the ports tree only if devel/upnp is not updated to the 1.8.x branch itself.

Tested successfully with poudriere on {11.2-12.0}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.
